description: A vertical point-of-view video that starts on a city sidewalk next to a red pole covered in stickers. The camera pans left and zooms in on a bustling outdoor street food stall or cafe. People are sitting at tables under umbrellas, and several motorbikes are parked in front. The shot focuses on a bright, illuminated yellow sign with red text that reads 'BÁNH MÌ'. The overall mood is one of exciting discovery in an urban travel setting.
